title: Lead Frontend Developer at Naukri.com Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Naukri.com Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Naukri.com Capital India has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
